title: Post-graduation work permit: Field of study - Currently eligible CIP codes - Canada.ca
content:
## Field of study: Currently eligible CIP codes
Last updated: July 4, 2025
Check the table below to search currently eligible Classification of Instructional Programs (CIP) codes (opens in a new tab) for the post-graduation work permit (PGWP) field of study requirement .
You don’t need to meet the field of study requirement if 1 of the following applies to you:
- You submitted your PGWP application before November 1, 2024, regardless of the level of study.
- You graduated from a PGWP-eligible flight school.
- You graduated with a bachelor’s degree, master’s degree or doctoral degree.
- You applied for a study permit before November 1, 2024.
If you don’t meet 1 of the exceptions above, use the table below to check if your program is eligible for a PGWP.
If you’re currently studying or you already graduated and your CIP doesn’t appear in the table below, you may still be eligible for a PGWP based on when you submitted your study permit application.
Check your CIP code to see if it’s eligible.
